content: Working in a fast food hamburger restaurant as a teenager was a depressing experience.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by nonong (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Lavorare in un fast food di hamburger da adolescente fu un'esperienza deprimente
